Title: Verify API Endpoint Response
Preconditions: API endpoint is up and running.
Test Steps:
1. Send a GET request to the API endpoint.
2. Send a POST request to the API endpoint with valid data.
3. Send a PUT request to the API endpoint with valid data.
4. Send a DELETE request to the API endpoint with valid data.
Expected Result:
1. API responds with HTTP 200 OK.
2. API responds with HTTP 201 Created.
3. API responds with HTTP 200 OK.
4. API responds with HTTP 200 OK.

Title: Verify User Interface Page Load
Preconditions: User interface pages are accessible via the API.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to a user interface page through the API.
2. Verify that the page loads successfully.
Expected Result: 1. Page loads successfully with no errors.

Title: Verify Data Management Operations
Preconditions: Repository and controllers are operational.
Test Steps:
1. Perform a create operation on a model.
2. Perform a read operation on a model.
3. Perform an update operation on a model.
4. Perform a delete operation on a model.
Expected Result:
1. Data is successfully created.
2. Data is successfully retrieved.
3. Data is successfully updated.
4. Data is successfully deleted.

Title: Verify Model Data Integrity
Preconditions: Models are defined and linked to repository/controllers.
Test Data: Valid and invalid data for models.
Test Steps:
1. Insert valid data into a model.
2. Insert invalid data into a model.
3. Retrieve data from a model.
4. Update data in a model.
5. Delete data from a model.
Expected Result:
1. Data is successfully inserted.
2. Invalid data insertion fails with appropriate error message.
3. Data is successfully retrieved.
4. Data is successfully updated.
5. Data is successfully deleted.

Title: Verify Database Operations
Preconditions: MySQL database is connected and operational.
Test Data: Valid and invalid data for database operations.
Test Steps:
1. Insert valid data into the database.
2. Insert invalid data into the database.
3. Retrieve data from the database.
4. Update data in the database.
5. Delete data from the database.
Expected Result:
1. Data is successfully inserted.
2. Invalid data insertion fails with appropriate error message.
3. Data is successfully retrieved.
4. Data is successfully updated.
5. Data is successfully deleted.

Title: Verify Content Delivery
Preconditions: Bunny.io CDN is configured and operational.
Test Steps:
1. Request a content URL from Bunny.io.
2. Verify that the content is delivered successfully.
Expected Result: 1. Content is delivered successfully with no errors.

Title: Verify Real-Time Communication
Preconditions: Real-time communication service is operational.
Test Steps:
1. Initiate a real-time communication session.
2. Send a message in real-time.
3. Receive the message in real-time.
Expected Result:
1. Real-time communication session is established successfully.
2. Message is sent successfully.
3. Message is received successfully.

Title: Verify Push Notifications
Preconditions: Push notifications system is operational.
Test Steps:
1. Send a push notification.
2. Verify that the notification is received.
Expected Result:
1. Notification is sent successfully.
2. Notification is received successfully.

Title: Verify Background Job Execution
Preconditions: Background jobs are scheduled and operational.
Test Steps:
1. Schedule a background job.
2. Execute the background job.
3. Verify that the job completes successfully.
Expected Result:
1. Job is scheduled successfully.
2. Job executes successfully.
3. Job completion is confirmed.

Title: Verify User Registration Process
Preconditions: User registration functionality is available.
Test Steps:
1. Provide valid user registration details.
2. Submit the registration form.
3. Verify that the user is registered successfully.
4. Verify that an OTP is generated and sent.
5. Enter the OTP and verify its correctness.
6. Verify that an authentication token is returned.
Expected Result:
1. User registration is successful.
2. OTP is generated and sent successfully.
3. OTP verification is successful.
4. Authentication token is returned successfully.
